title: cyperus altochrysocephalus
intro: Cyperus altochrysocephalus, also known as the Yellow Papyrus Sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Its herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, have been traditionally used in African medicine to promote digestion, ease menstrual cramps, and support immune function. Further research is needed to confirm the full scope of its medicinal and health benefits.
